prestazioni: ECU reflash via HP Tuners VCM Suite targeting the **LE5 2.0L Ecotec direct-injection turbocharged engine** (GM engine code: LE5), optimizing boost pressure to 24 psi (stock: 12 psi) with a custom 3-bar MAP sensor calibration, methanol injection via Snow Performance Stage 3 kit (50/50 meth-water mix), and revised ignition timing for 93 octane fuel with E85 flex-fuel capability (via Continental ethanol sensor).

Forced induction upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger** (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor wheel) paired with a **PTP Turbo Fabrication LE5-specific turbo manifold** (304 stainless steel, equal-length runners), **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate**, and **TurboSmart Race Port blow-off valve** (set to 22 psi crack pressure). Intercooler system replaced with a **VRSF 5.5" front-mount intercooler** (5.5" core, 24" x 12" x 3.5" dimensions) and **Mishimoto silicone couplers** (4-ply, reinforced with heat-resistant sleeves).

Drivetrain reinforcement with **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** (multi-disc, cerametallic friction material, 6 puck design) and **Spec aluminum flywheel** (SFI-certified), paired with a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (80% lockup under power) in the **GM F40 6-speed manual transmission**. Axles upgraded to **DSS Racing 3.5" chromoly axles** (with CV joints rated for 800whp) and **Energy Suspension polyurethane differential mounts** (red, 95A durometer).
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (Sky Redline-specific, 3-piece fenders, carbon fiber overfenders, and front/rear bumpers with integrated canards and diffuser), painted in **PPG Concept Black** with **3M Matte Purple Flake** (custom mixed, 20% flake density) and clear-coated with **Ceramic Pro 9H** for UV resistance.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (double-flow valve, 24-way adjustable compression/rebound, Sky Redline-specific valving) paired with **Whiteline adjustable sway bars** (24mm front, 22mm rear, 3-position adjustable) and **Polyurethane Bushings Inc. (PBI) full subframe bushings** (80A durometer, red). Wheel setup: **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (255/40/18 front, 285/35/18 rear).

Aerodynamic and functional upgrades including a **Seibon Carbon Fiber hood** (LE5-specific, vented, with integrated NACA ducts for intercooler airflow), **AeroCatch hood latches** (carbon fiber, quick-release), **Custom carbon fiber rear wing** (3D-printed airfoil, 3-position angle adjustment, 12" chord, mounted via **APR Performance GT-250 wing risers**), and **LED headlight conversion** (Morimoto XB LED projectors, **Diode Dynamics SS3 Max** high beams, **Lux H8 V4** fog lights with **Oznium HID anti-flicker harness**). Interior: **Recaro Pole Position seats** (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leatherette upholstery) with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**, **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede, quick-release hub), and **AEM CD-7 dash** (10" touchscreen, CAN bus integration with LE5 ECU for real-time boost, AFR, and oil pressure monitoring).
